work_completed: Diagnosed that the published @neurolift-technologies/toi@1.0.0 tarball contains no dist/ (only LICENSE/README/SPEC/package.json/schema), so its main/types/exports point at nonexistent files and the package is non-functional on install
Confirmed the same defect in @neurolift-technologies/otoi@1.0.0 (npm pack shows only package.json), and that otoi imports toi values at runtime — so toi must ship dist before otoi can build/publish
Bumped packages/toi/package.json to 1.0.1 and recorded the packaging fix under CHANGELOG [Unreleased] > Fixed
Verified locally: tsc build produces dist/index.js + dist/index.d.ts; vitest 65/65 pass; `npm publish --dry-run` confirms dist/ is included in the 1.0.1 tarball via the prepack build

Addressed PR #18 review feedback: synced packages/toi/package-lock.json root version 1.0.0 -> 1.0.1 (flagged by Codex), and added publishConfig.access=public to packages/toi/package.json so this scoped package publishes publicly by default (Gemini Code Assist + Codex)
work_in_progress: PR #18 open — merge to land the 1.0.1 bump in main
resolution: Maintainer supplied 2FA OTPs. @neurolift-technologies/toi@1.0.1 published (Apache-2.0, tarball includes dist/index.js + dist/index.d.ts).
@neurolift-technologies/otoi@1.1.0 then built against toi@1.0.1 and published (Apache-2.0, ships LICENSE + dist).
End-to-end verified: clean `npm install @neurolift-technologies/otoi@1.1.0` resolves otoi + toi with dist, and an ESM import loads successfully.
decisions_made: Patch bump (1.0.1) — packaging fix only, no API change

Recorded the fix under CHANGELOG [Unreleased] > Fixed rather than a [1.0.1] section, because this repo's CHANGELOG version line (0.8.0/Unreleased) tracks the framework, separate from the npm package version line
decisions_pending: Merge PR #18 to land the 1.0.1 bump in main (publishes are already done)
Optional: npm deprecate the broken 1.0.0 versions of both packages (needs a 2FA OTP)
escalations: Escalated the broken-dist discovery to Joshua, who chose 'fix & publish both'; resolved — both packages published with his 2FA OTPs
handoff_record.next_agent_notes: Status: both packages published and verified end-to-end; PR #18 is MERGEABLE/CLEAN and ready to merge. PR review (checked inline review comments + reviews + issue comments — not just issue comments): Gemini Code Assist requested publishConfig.access=public, and Codex (posting as JDUB1216) flagged the stale lockfile version; both addressed on this branch. CodeRabbit itself was rate-limited (no review); re-trigger with `@coderabbitai review` if wanted. For future NLT npm publishes: confirm dist/ ships via `npm publish --dry-run`, expect a maintainer 2FA OTP (npm EOTP), and verify with a clean install+import. Optional cleanup: `npm deprecate @neurolift-technologies/toi@1.0.0` and `...otoi@1.0.0` (broken: missing dist). Consider an npm automation token to avoid OTP friction on future publishes.
tests_run: npm run build (tsc) in packages/toi — dist/index.js + dist/index.d.ts produced
npm publish --dry-run --access public — tarball includes full dist/ (45 files, 35.1 kB)
Post-publish: npm view confirms toi@1.0.1 + otoi@1.1.0 (both Apache-2.0); clean `npm install @neurolift-technologies/otoi@1.1.0` + ESM import succeeds end-to-end

Reviewed ALL PR #18 comment types (inline review comments + reviews + issue comments): Gemini Code Assist (publishConfig.access) and Codex (stale lockfile version) — both addressed; CodeRabbit rate-limited (no review). PR MERGEABLE/CLEAN.
